text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, can I drop by my workplace for a second? It's
just around the corner.

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We arrive to find Daitaku Helios and Mejiro
Palmer with Ines Fujin's managers for some
reason.

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: Huh?! N-no, not at all! It's just, well... You know... Right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Right! We're, like, looking for work!
Right, Helios?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Uh... W-we so are?! It's vibes right now 'cause the
manager hooked us up?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, gotcha. So... You're having some kind of
work fair?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I can help out with this! I mean, I literally
work part-time at these places myself.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: So, for example...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
At a ramen shop, your main tasks would be taking
orders, serving bowls, and cleaning!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
And the trick to a good greeting is to keep it curt
and clear! Just copy how the director speaks and
you'll sound fine. ♪

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
The voice Fu uses when she speaks to customers
is amazing! Some of our customers order extra
just to hear it again!
choice_data_list: What's it like working at a convenience store?
What's it like working at a convenience store?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You'll mostly be stacking shelves and working the
register. Nothing too hard as long as your
customer service skills are decent!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and you get to speak to a whole host of
customers! It's really a great way to connect with
the local community!

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
And we also get huge lines of people all hoping
to connect with you, Fu! That's really something
you should be proud of.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Whoa, you guys! I feel like you're talking
more about me than the job!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I do get the sense that the topic of conversation
has shifted from the nature of the job to praising
Ines Fujin's work ethic...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh! There should be one more opening too... It's
for an early-morning job, so maybe that's why
nobody's here to advertise it?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, the job's flyer distribution! The company
I've been working for has been really good to me
ever since I started way back!

text_block_list.name: Helios & Palmer
text_block_list.text: You're...

text_block_list.name: Helios & Palmer
text_block_list.text: Sooo goated!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I knew you'd been working, like, a lot of part-time jobs, but I didn't know you were such a total pro! Man, we are so not worthy of your presence!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Um, what? You're definitely going a little too far
there...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Or maybe not?! Actually, I totally agree!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Maybe you should call me the Part-Time Pro! In
fact... I want everyone here to revere me!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, let's start by having you address me as
"Boss Ines."

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! I'm kidding, I'm kidding! But still...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
If you do end up working with me, I promise I'll
show you the ropes.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I want you guys to have a good experience, and
to make things easier for my bosses.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: With me around, you'll be pro workers in no time!
choice_data_list: Spoken like a true Part-Time Pro.
Spoken like a true Part-Time Pro.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: With me around, you'll be pro workers in no time!
choice_data_list: Spoken like a true Part-Time Pro.
Spoken like a true Part-Time Pro.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, you know it! None of that stuff on my
resume is there for show.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I mean, how many top employees do you think
I've already trained from the ground up? Heheh.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, it's this late already?! I need to get to my
next shift!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oho? Thinking about getting a part-time job,
Trainer? Knowing how skilled you are, I think I
could use your help.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
No, wait—you can't! You'd end up way too busy if
you started juggling jobs!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
No matter what you're doing, you should never
push yourself too hard. ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, it's this late already?! I need to get to my
next shift!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
All right, you guys have got this!
And I'll see you around, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Stop right there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Like, sorry for the secrecy, but the truth is we
really really wanted to discuss something with
you, Trainer...
